title: Senior Protocol Engineer at Provable
description: Provable is hiring a Senior Protocol Engineer to design and implement zero-knowledge protocols. Focus: Rust, Cryptography, Distributed Systems.

title: Senior Software Engineer - Prime at Alpaca
description: Alpaca is looking for a Senior Software Engineer for its Prime brokerage infrastructure. Focus: Go, Rust, Distributed Systems.

title: Software Engineer - Solana at Rain
description: Rain is hiring a Software Engineer for Solana development. Salary range: $140k - $240k. Focus: Rust, Anchor, Solana Web3.js.

title: ParaFi Capital and Jupiter Invest in Web3 Infrastructure
description: ParaFi Capital and Jupiter have announced a strategic investment in decentralized infrastructure projects to enhance Solana ecosystem's scalability and liquidity.

title: TRM Labs Launches New Anti-Exploit Tool
description: TRM Labs has released a real-time recovery tool for DeFi protocols to track stolen assets across 30+ blockchains, aimed at reducing the impact of cross-chain hacks.

title: IoTeX ioTube bridge hacked for $4.4M
description: The IoTeX ioTube cross-chain bridge was exploited for approximately $4.4 million due to a compromised private key used for a malicious contract upgrade.
